description: Shaela Miller’s years spent doing good country music work are safely etched into public consciousness.  A turn at this point is by no means an undoing, but a welcome lead into new territory.  Miller’s fast-rising path is set to be amplified by a sonic reintroduction to one of Alberta’s best voices and most sincere stage personalities. With her latest release, After The Masquerade, Miller explores a dual world of New Wave and Classic Country — a self-indulgent trip back to a world of music she’s been patiently waiting to explore.
title: Shaela Miller Concert
